name: bluesafe-platform
description: BlueSafe XRPL hackathon monorepo: mobile frontend, BE1 XRPL service, BE2 operations API, and XRPL core package.

scripts.dev:be1: cross-env PORT=3000 npm --workspace services/be1-xrpl run start:dev
scripts.dev:be2: cross-env PORT=3100 npm --workspace services/be2-ops run dev
